description: Interior debris cleaning under permit #19-11495-DEMI. In the course of this work, we discovered a great deal of ongoing water intrusion in some areas, which has led to a great deal of rot and significant structural damage. This emergency permit is to replace these spots of significant structural damage with sound framing. We will only put back framing that exactly matches the existing; there is no change in walls or openings or floor plan contemplated in this permit. The areas of structural damage are highlighted on the attached floor plans. No use or occupancy
Fire Damage repair: remove and replace damaged studs and joists, Electrical, roof shingles, reset kitchen sink, replace 4 windows, flooring, remove and place siding, and sheetrock
Complete rebuild: demolition, new walls, new electrical, HVAC, plumbing, windows, roofing, kitchen, bathrooms, etc. 3 story new verses two story existing.
